## Scope

- [ ] Fits this repository's open-source boundary.
- [ ] Does not introduce Cloud billing, wallet, Stripe, hosted marketplace, or commercial dashboard behavior.
- [ ] Does not include secrets, private URLs, customer data, or local `.env` values.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests or checks were run locally.
- [ ] Documentation was updated, or no documentation change is needed.
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior was reviewed, or this change is not security-sensitive.
